title: Just Paxels
description: A simple lightweight serverside mod that adds paxels - pickaxe/axe/shovel/hoes.
body:
# Welcome to the Just Paxels page!
### Just Paxels is a simple, lightweight, **serverside** mod that adds paxels, which are _just_ a combination pickaxe/axe/shovel/hoe.

**This is a quality of life mod, specifically for reducing space in your inventory.**

Includes 6 variants:
- Wood ![Wooden Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9a916ecc4aedb14e7366b8855d68762ec6e2970.png)
- Stone ![Stone Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d47d7b4e7c7a32ae36e058183eea8decba0504.png)
- Gold ![Golden Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f638e8b9614a870c6ba4828c0239c2b89f7b1012.png)
- Iron ![Iron Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7619f7f5fea0a899cee9db7de5006d4c2804937.png)
- Diamond ![Diamond Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9f2a84d1bdddfb2c8cc9798c98de009876d599.png)
- Netherite ![Netherite Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffa175eea0ebc00f0d1cb4cf6d3139694871f68.png)

Includes 6 recipes:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2ZQvTqLt-9A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**All paxels have durability and efficiency according to their type; eg: wood < stone < iron.**
